programme.title: Wilderness Chronicles
programme.desc: The movie Jaws was inspired by a string of shark attacks... some in FRESHWATER! In this eerie episode of Wilderness Chronicles, Kyle Green explores the shocking reality of sharks found in freshwater. From bull sharks traveling up the Mississippi River to strange reports out of the Great Lakes, we examine how far these predators can really go. You'll hear about bull sharks in Lake Nicaragua, the science behind their survival in rivers and lakes, and theories about whether they could adapt to colder waters. It's a mix of strange history, biology, and firsthand accounts that might make you think twice before jumping in.

programme.title: Wilderness Chronicles
programme.desc: Could dinosaurs still walk the Earth? Deep in the Congo, legends say yes. In this episode of The Wilderness Chronicles, Kyle Green investigates the chilling reports of Mokele-mbembe, a dinosaur-like creature said to inhabit the remote swamps of the Congo Basin. We dive into real expedition footage, indigenous stories, and eyewitness accounts that all point to one shocking possibility: something ancient may still be alive in the heart of Africa. From early missionary reports in the 1900s to modern explorers risking their lives to chase the unknown, we piece together the long-standing mystery surrounding alleged dinosaur sightings in Africa. Whether you're into cryptids, paleontology, or just love a good wilderness mystery, this episode will have you questioning what’s really hiding in the unexplored corners of the Earth.

programme.title: FishON! | Weathering the Storm: Walleye on Porcupine Lake

Patience was key as we waited for a break in challenging weather conditions—but it all paid off with an unforgettable day on the water. Tune in for expert tips, stunning scenery, and the thrill of fishing in Northern Ontario!

programme.title: Stoked on Fishing | Party Boat El Dorado Takes on Cortez Bank
programme.desc: Fishing out west has been fantastic this year, but eventually, the fish move or disappear due to currents, weather, or heavy traffic. However, there are always some offshore banks that have resident fish on or around them year-round, and one of those spots is called the Cortez Bank. You can always guarantee one thing: if you make it 110 miles, you'll catch some big Rockfish. Additionally, if Mother Nature and currents work out in your favor, there can be some incredible Yellowtail fishing on the bank. Today, we're rallying up for our "Stoked On Fishing" day and a half charter on board the one and only El Dorado, a top vessel in the Long Beach sport fishing scene. With anticipation running high, we can't wait to cast our lines and see what kind of adventures await us on the open waters.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep110: The Ship Sinkers
programme.desc: Mothballed, de-commissioned naval vessels are toxic time-bombs, filled with PCB’s, asbestos, lead paint, oil and grease. Hundreds rust in dockyards around the world. What can be done with them? A team of Canadians has developed an innovative solution…they clean the ships...then sink them!

programme.title: Wild Shots
programme.desc: Tim Harmsen trains at Summit Point, testing rapid-fire shooting and vehicle combat tactics. At Fort Sumter, he reflects on the Civil War’s legacy with a 100-gun salute. Then it’s off to Avidity Arms, where Rob Pincus joins him to explore real-world home defense. From tactical holsters to high-speed vehicle drills, Tim puts it all to the test in a live-fire evolution under pressure.

programme.title: Wild Shots
programme.desc: In this episode of Wild Shots, Tim Harmsen heads to the heart of American gun craftsmanship with an exclusive, behind-the-scenes tour of Palmetto State Armory, where freedom is literally built on the production floor. From the anodizing line to live assembly, Tim witnesses American ingenuity in action as a rifle comes to life before his eyes. With the epic 10,000-Round Challenge complete, it’s time for some serious maintenance. The crew at SEAL 1 steps in with their cutting-edge nanotechnology to give the battle-worn BCM AK the deep clean it deserves. Once the guns are gleaming, it’s time to send rounds downrange. Teaming up with top firearms influencer Sootch, Tim takes aim at a new challenge, including a 1,000-yard Wild Shot that pushes precision, patience, and performance to the limit.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The day begins with a powerful dose of perspective as contestants hear real-life breaching stories from American heroes—reminders of the stakes they’re preparing for. The team is then introduced to a concealed firearm headrest safe designed for rapid-response vehicle defense. Next, it’s straight into the action with a preliminary course of fire using GreenLight sights, where top performers are pushed even further with a bonus round to test speed, accuracy, and composure under pressure. The intensity ramps up during a sentry scenario featuring SABRE CO₂ non-lethal cartridges, putting their stealth and judgment to the test. But just as the dust begins to settle, a new CIA briefing drops—and it’s the most dire yet. With mission reality closing in fast, the contestants close the day with a crash course in S.E.R.E. (Survival, Evasion, Resistance, and Escape) training, rounding out their classroom combat readiness with hard-earned grit.

programme.title: An Eye For An Eye (1966)
programme.desc: A former bounty hunter teams up with a younger one to find the gang leader who murdered his wife and boy.

programme.title: Pepino's Mama
programme.desc: Luke schemes to get rich by selling Mama Garcia's bean sauce.

programme.title: You Can't Always Be a Hero
programme.desc: Grampa thinks he's the perfect role model for Little Luke.

programme.title: The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
programme.desc: Stagecoach driver Abe Williamson hunts down two outlaws who robbed his stagecoach.

programme.title: Jimmy Dayton's Bonanza
programme.desc: The honeymoon is over when Jim Dayton's wife stumbles onto his past.

programme.title: Black Horse Canyon
programme.desc: Ranchers (Joel McCrea, Race Gentry) catch stallion for girl (Mari Blanchard) and her uncle.

programme.title: Tension at Table Rock
programme.desc: Grit Xtra invites you to saddle up and ride alongside the larger-than-life stars of TV and cinema’s most iconic Westerns.

programme.title: Hawkeye and the Last of the Mohicans
programme.desc: Hawkeye and Chingachgook find a young Irish girl, Bridget, alone in the woods.

programme.title: Hawkeye and the Last of the Mohicans
programme.desc: Hawkeye and Chingachgook rescue an elderly woman from two Indians who have kidnapped her.

programme.title: Hawkeye and the Last of the Mohicans
programme.desc: Hawkeye and Chingachgook set out to help a young Indian boy who has been raised by a white man.

programme.title: The Dude Ranger 1934,
programme.desc: A wealthy Easterner inherits a Western ranch and goes undercover as a cowboy to investigate a corrupt foreman who is plotting to seize the property for himself

programme.title: Bonanza Season 2 Episode 7 Day of Reckoning
programme.desc: After a Native American man and his wife are ostracized by their tribes and attempt to build a life as farmers on the Ponderosa, a bigoted neighbor’s violent act of revenge triggers a dangerous cycle of vengeance that tests Ben Cartwright’s faith

programme.title: The Crooked Trail (1936)
programme.desc: A rancher uncovers a scheme by a corrupt rival to steal land and cattle, forcing him to take justice into his own hands to clear his name and save the valley.

programme.title: The Wagon Train S2E16 The Hunter Malloy Story
programme.desc: After Hunter Malloy kills a man in self-defense, he flees to the wagon train to escape a vengeful sheriff. As the lawman closes in, Malloy must decide whether to continue running or stand his ground and face the consequences of his actions.

programme.title: The Wagon Train S4E35 The Janet Hale Story
programme.desc: A young, ambitious woman joins the wagon train hoping to start a new life, but her secret past and a vengeful man from her former life threaten to derail her future and endanger the entire caravan

programme.title: White Comanche 1968
programme.desc: In White Comanche, William Shatner takes on a daring double role as twin brothers—one a peace-seeking drifter, the other a ruthless Comanche warrior bent on bloodshed. As the frontier town reels from raids and rising violence, the brothers are set on a collision course that can only end in a deadly showdown. Filled with tense standoffs, frontier action, and Shatner’s commanding presence, this Spaghetti Western delivers a tale of fate, family, and vengeance.

programme.title: Silver Spurs
programme.desc: Roy's boss has inherited a very large ranch, but the will keeps him from selling it--although his widow could. Lucky Miller is out to get control of the ranch, so he has a girl come West to marry him, then after the wedding he has his henchman kill the owner. Roy is nearby, and when the murder gun is switched with his, he finds himself in jail.

programme.title: Lawless Range
programme.desc: John Middleton is investigating cattle rustling when he is captured and tossed into a cave with Emmett, a rancher who disappeared earlier. They help each other escape and learn that a local banker is trying to scare everyone away to grab up some secret gold mines.

programme.title: Frontier Pony Express
programme.desc: As Yankee and Rebel forces contend for the allegiance of California, Pony Express rider Roy and his sidekick must round up a pack of villains before Roy can turn his attentions to the girl.

programme.title: Heldorado
programme.desc: Heldorado is an annual parade celebrating Las Vegas as a frontier town. Roy is captain of the guards at Boulder Dam. He helps celebrate the town's anniversary while capturing racketeers involved with the local casinos.
